name: The Secret Of The Shiledars
overview: A secret society unravels a hidden treasure belonging to Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, with Rajeev leading the quest to protect it from falling into wrong hands, ultimately becoming the chief of the Shiledars.

trailers.title: Hotstar Specials: The Secret Of The Shiledars | Official Trailer | Rajeev Khandelwal | Sai Tamhankar
